patches.title: Open Container on Arrival
patches.trigger: agent is at a closed container while searching for a target object believed to be inside
action_flow: inspect the contents for the target object
if target is present, pick it up; if not, close the container and move to the next candidate
avoid: using 'examine' or 'look' on the container without opening it
standing idle or trying non-container actions
repeatedly opening the same container without checking contents
patches.principle: agent is at a closed container while searching for a target object believed to be inside. Steps: open the closed container immediately; inspect the contents for the target object; if target is present, pick it up; if not, close the container and move to the next candidate
patches.when_to_apply: agent is at a closed container while searching for a target object believed to be inside

patches.title: Hold Object Before Appliance
patches.trigger: task requires using an appliance (e.g., fridge, microwave, sink) to change an object's state (cool, heat, clean)
action_flow: first locate and pick up the target object (if not already in inventory)
then navigate to the nearest relevant appliance
finally use the appliance on the object
avoid: attempting to use the appliance while the target object is not in inventory
moving to the appliance before acquiring the object
using the appliance on any non-target object
patches.principle: task requires using an appliance (e.g., fridge, microwave, sink) to change an object's state (cool, heat, clean). Steps: first locate and pick up the target object (if not already in inventory); then navigate to the nearest relevant appliance; finally use the appliance on the object
patches.when_to_apply: task requires using an appliance (e.g., fridge, microwave, sink) to change an object's state (cool, heat, clean)

patches.title: Systematic Open Sweep
patches.trigger: target object is not visible in the initial room description and there are multiple closed containers (cabinets, drawers) that could hold it
action_flow: enumerate all closed containers in the room
visit each container exactly once in a logical order (e.g., by type or proximity)
for each container: open it, check for the target object, and if found, take it; otherwise close it and proceed to the next
continue until object is found or all containers exhausted
avoid: using 'examine' or 'look' as a substitute for opening
opening the same container multiple times unnecessarily
patches.principle: target object is not visible in the initial room description and there are multiple closed containers (cabinets, drawers) that could hold it. Steps: enumerate all closed containers in the room; visit each container exactly once in a logical order (e.g., by type or proximity); for each container: open it, check for the target object, and if found, take it; otherwise close it and proceed to the next; continue until object is found or all containers exhausted
patches.when_to_apply: target object is not visible in the initial room description and there are multiple closed containers (cabinets, drawers) that could hold it
